snippet.title: Bellestrelle ft. Harry Azrul - Jiwa Yang Mengalah (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Jiwa Yang Mengalah merupakan sebuah perjalanan penuh emosi yang menggambarkan perjuangan senyap yang ramai alami di sebalik kehidupan seharian. Dipersembahkan oleh Bellestrelle featuring Harry Azrul, lagu ini menyelami tekanan emosi, kesunyian, dan kesakitan yang sering tersembunyi daripada pandangan orang lain.
Melalui lirik yang mendalam dan penyampaian yang penuh penghayatan, Jiwa Yang Mengalah menceritakan kisah seseorang yang berjuang memikul beban kehidupan sambil menyembunyikan luka di sebalik senyuman. Bahagian yang dibawakan oleh Harry Azrul menyampaikan mesej ketabahan dan kekuatan, mengingatkan pendengar bahawa walaupun berada dalam kegelapan, masih ada sinar harapan untuk terus melangkah.
Lagu ini ditujukan kepada mereka yang berasa hilang arah, terbeban, atau tidak difahami. Jiwa Yang Mengalah menjadi peringatan bahawa setiap perjuangan yang tidak terlihat berhak menerima kasih sayang dan empati, serta tiada siapa yang sepatutnya menghadapi pertempuran hidup seorang diri.
"Jiwa Yang Mengalah" oleh Bellestrelle featuring Harry Azrul ialah sebuah balada emosi yang mengisahkan kesakitan yang tersembunyi, pergolakan mental, dan pencarian harapan di tengah-tengah tekanan kehidupan. Satu peringatan yang kuat bahawa pertempuran yang berlaku dalam diri sering kali merupakan perjuangan yang tidak dapat dilihat oleh sesiapa.

Artist : Bellestrelle ft. Harry Azrul
Song : Jiwa Yang Mengalah
Producer : Mas Dewangga
Arranger : Mas Dewangga
Composer : Bellestrelle
Lyricist : Bellestrelle
OP : Rusa Publishing Sdn Bhd
P & C line :  RUSA Music Sdn Bhd & Bellestrelle

Executive Producer : Brattbob
A&R : Amirul Rizuan
Content Team (RUSA) : Amirul Rizuan, Achmad Danish

Bellestrelle Team :
Photographer & Editor : Saa
Assistant photographer : Kurkur
Lighting : Arep
Pembantu : Arul, Una, Sya, Mei, Nana

Lyric : Jiwa yang Hilang

Verse 1
Hari demi hari aku terus melangkah
Walau hati retak tak siapa yang kisah
Penat aku simpan semua tekanan
Senyum tiada seri hidup tiada erti

Kamu tak tahu perang yang aku lawan
Jiwaku mengamuk, ku menahan beban
Penat aku simpan semua tekanan
Senyum tiada seri, hidup tiada erti

Chorus
Tekanan yang datang
Menghukumi diriku, hilang jalan pulang
Bebanan yang datang buat aku hilang
Aku ingin pulang

Post-Chorus
Kalau mereka tahu apa dalam dada
Mungkin mereka takkan bercakap sewenang wenangnya
Aku sakit, tapi aku sembunyi..
Sebab dunia tak faham sakit yang tak nampak di hati.

Harry Azrul
Dalam gelap, ku belajar berdiri
Tak tunggu siapa, datang slamatkan hati
Beribu kata pedih pernah di telan
aku tetap pilih, jadi yang di depan

Orang cari salah laku tak pernah lurus
Tapi Tuhan tahu semuanya ikhlas tulus
Kadang dada sempit susah nak tarik nafas
Tapi aku tetap kuat walau hidup ni keras

snippet.title: Other Mommy | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Your mommy won’t save you. Other Mommy only in theaters October 9.

Can I go inside your heart?

From James Wan, one of the most influential architects of modern horror behind the Saw, Insidious and The Conjuring franchises—and Rob Savage, the director of bold genre films Host and The Boogeyman, comes a terrifying trip into the darkening world of a young girl, Bela, who forms a relationship with a sinister entity in her home who looks uncannily like her own mother.

Academy Award® winner Jessica Chastain (It Chapter Two, The Eyes of Tammy Faye) stars in a dual role as Bela’s mother and as “Other Mommy,” a manifestation of the entity. Jay Duplass (Transparent, Industry) plays Daddo, Bela’s father, and Arabella Olivia Clark (The Housemaid, The Hand that Rocks the Cradle) plays Bela. 

The impressive supporting cast includes Actor Award nominee Dichen Lachman (Severance), Emmy and Tony Award nominee Arian Moayed (Succession) and screen legend Karen Allen (Indiana Jones films).  

From Blumhouse Atomic Monster, Other Mommy is directed by Rob Savage from a screenplay by WGA award winner Nathan Elston, writer for the Emmy-winning sensation Succession, based on the New York Times bestselling novel Incidents Around the House by Josh Malerman (Bird Box).

The film is produced by James Wan, p.g.a., and is executive produced by Michael Clear, Judson Scott, Rob Savage, Josh Malerman and Ryan Lewis. 

Social Handles
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/othermommy/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/othermommy/
TikTok: http://www.tiktok.com/@othermommy
Official Site: https://www.othermommymovie.com

snippet.title: Clayface | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Meet the new face of Gotham. #ClayfaceMovie only in theaters October 23.

DC Studios’ “Clayface” is a horror thriller from director James Watkins, starring Tom Rhys Harries in the title role of the cult favorite villain from Gotham’s rogues gallery.

Matt Hagen’s meteoric rise from Gotham street kid to Hollywood leading man is tragically cut short when a local crime boss’s actions leave him horribly disfigured. Abandoned by his team and with nothing left, Matt seeks out a cutting edge treatment that miraculously returns him to his former self… but also unexpectedly affects his grip on reality, spiraling him down a destructive path of all-consuming revenge.

The film also stars Naomi Ackie, David Dencik, Max Minghella and Eddie Marsan, as well as Nancy Carroll and Joshua James.

James Watkins directs from a screenplay by Mike Flanagan and Hossein Amini, story by Flanagan, based on characters from DC. The film is produced by Matt Reeves, Lynn Harris, James Gunn and Peter Safran, with Michael E. Uslan, Chantal Nong Vo, Lars P. Winther, Rafi Crohn and Paul Ritchie executive producing.

Watkins’ creative team includes director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer James Price, editor Jon Harris and costume designer Keith Madden. Music is by Volker Bertelmann.

DC Studios Presents a 6th & Idaho Production, a James Watkins Film, “Clayface.” The film will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures and released only in theaters in North America on October 23, 2026, and internationally beginning 21 October 2026.
